issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page, not an article or report - violates Core Rule 5
event_type is 'unknown' but should not be - the page itself is not a report and cannot be assigned a meaningful event_type from the taxonomy
No actual report content, policy determinations, or analysis present - only links to reports
published_at field is empty but is required metadata
No archival value as the actual substantive reports are separate documents
human_review_reason: The record correctly identifies the source as a listing page with no substantive content. This is a clear reject per Core Rule 5 (listing_page source_type). The generated record already has the correct assessment.
